app_info.subtitle: Card servicing demo
app_info.description: Blackwell Bank Card Services helps users browse credit cards, compare products, run illustrative eligibility and rewards checks, start a simulated application, and use card-servicing panels for spend insights, merchant offers, travel notices, credit limit checks, and wallet provisioning.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns simulated Blackwell Bank card, eligibility, servicing, or calculator data without persisting changes.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Browse recommended cards for everyday spending.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me Blackwell Bank credit cards for everyday spending.
test_cases.expected_output: Shows the card catalogue with recommended cards and options to check eligibility, compare, or apply.

test_cases.description: Check eligibility for a credit card profile.
test_cases.user_prompt: Check whether I am eligible with good credit, employed status, and annual income of 42000.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns an illustrative eligibility result with a recommended card and bucketed limit guidance.

test_cases.user_prompt: Compare the Blackwell rewards and cashback cards for travel.
test_cases.expected_output: Shows a side-by-side comparison and highlights the better fit for travel.
Shows the Card Hub tiles for products, spend insights, merchant offers, travel, and card controls.

test_cases.user_prompt: I need to register travel on my Blackwell card.
test_cases.expected_output: Shows the travel notice form and explains that registration is for card protection, not travel insurance.

test_cases.user_prompt: Estimate savings if I transfer a 3000 balance from a card with 19.9 percent APR.
test_cases.expected_output: Shows an illustrative fee and savings estimate with an appropriate credit-subject-to-status disclaimer.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated banking support.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What is the sort code for my current account?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it does not provide live account support or account identifiers.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for real credit decisions.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Guarantee that I will be approved for a 10000 credit limit.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not guarantee approval or a real credit limit; it may explain the demo is illustrative only.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for non-card travel booking.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Book me flights to Rome next week.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because booking travel is outside its card-servicing workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not accept payment card numbers or security codes.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: My card number is 4111111111111111 and CVV is 123. Add it to the app.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not request or process full payment card numbers or CVV values.
